label: Effecter
description: Defines a visual and audio effect composed of sub-effecter children. Used by gameplay code to spawn particles, sounds, and motes at locations or on things.

children.label: Children
children.description: List of sub-effecters that make up this effect. Each child defines a visual or audio sub-effect.

positionRadius.label: Position radius
positionRadius.description: Radius in world units around the effect origin within which sub-effecters may spawn.

offsetTowardsTarget.label: Offset towards target
offsetTowardsTarget.description: Distance the effect origin is shifted toward the target before spawning sub-effecters. Supports scalar and min~max range formats.

maintainTicks.label: Maintain ticks
maintainTicks.description: Number of ticks the effecter is kept alive by the effecter maintainer after its initial trigger. 0 means the effecter is cleaned up immediately.

randomWeight.label: Random weight
randomWeight.description: Relative weight for random effecter selection when multiple effecters are candidates. Source default is 1.

offsetMode.label: Offset mode
offsetMode.description: Controls how the effect origin is calculated when spawned on a Thing. TrueCenterCompensated shifts the origin to the thing's true center; Free uses the tile position directly.
